snippet.title: The Tale of Ronin: Final Chapter
snippet.description:
Ronin faces off against Red King's army in the animated finale of The Tale of Ronin 🔥

Read Volumes 1 & 2 of the manga in-game for the full tale!

X ► https://twitter.com/ClashRoyale/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashroyale
TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashroyale
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashRoyale/

ENTER THE ARENA
Build your Battle Deck and outsmart the enemy in fast real-time battles. From the creators of CLASH OF CLANS comes a real-time multiplayer battle game starring your favourite Clash characters and more. Start battling against players from around the world!

BECOME A MASTER OF STRATEGY AND DECK BUILDING
Choose unique Cards to your Battle Deck and head to the Arena for Battle!
Place your Cards right and knock down the enemy King and Tower Troops from their Towers in a strategic and fast-paced match.

COLLECT AND UPGRADE 100+ CARDS
Hog Rider! Collect and upgrade 100+ Cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defences you know and love and many others. Win battles and progress to new Arenas to unlock powerful new Cards to your collection!

BATTLE YOUR WAY TO THE TOP
Battle your way to the League and Global Tournaments to match against the best players in the world.
Compete for glory and rewards!

SEASONAL EVENTS
Unlock new Seasonal items like Tower Skins, Emotes and powerful Magic Items with the Season Pass and participate in fun Challenges that put your skills to the test!

JOIN A CLAN AND GO TO WAR
Join or form a Clan with other players to share Cards and battle in Clan Wars for BIG rewards!

See you in the Arena!
#ClashRoyale

snippet.title: TennoCon 2026 | Warframe: Tau | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Prepare to step beyond the Origin System and enter Tau in 2026. 

Once a paradise built by the Sentients, Tau has been lost to war and ruin. Nowhere is this felt more keenly than on the black rain-soaked streets of Fornax, a colossal Sentient ring city. Here, the devastating downpour and its maddening influence run in rivulets from the heights of the Hunra's gambling dens, through the Docks, and into the most desperate Slums — where the residents have turned to the mind-altering Bloom in search of escape.

There, Albrecht Entrati awaits the arrival of the Tenno after conscripting the inner monologuing and noir-inspired Warframe, Brysko, to infiltrate the Hunra's criminal underworld — a final gamble to avert Fornax falling to those with nothing to lose.

Get ready to risk it all. Warframe: Tau arrives later this year.

Forever, and ever

Forever young

And diamonds are forever

So many adventures couldn't happen today
So many songs we forgot to play
So many dreams swinging out of the blue
We let them come true

[Chorus]
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever
Forever young, I want to be forever young
Do you really want to live forever?
Forever, and ever

Forever young, I wanna be forever young

snippet.title: DJ Zapaz - Restez Avec Moi (Official Music Video) | Afro House
snippet.description:
C'est disponible dès maintenant ! Écoutez-le ! 🎧: https://too.fm/nydexv3

Découvrez "Restez Avec Moi", le nouveau clip officiel de DJ Zapaz !   
Préparez-vous à une immersion totale conçue pour enflammer les festivals de musique et faire vibrer les boîtes de nuit tout au long de l'année. Ce banger unique fait fusionner la fraîcheur ensoleillée de la Tropical House et l'efficacité mélodique de la Dance Pop avec la puissance rythmique de la Tribal / Afro House, du House classique et du Deep House. Porté par une fête estivale sonore et l'impact d'une basse agressive, laissez-vous emporter par cette invitation hypnotique à prolonger la nuit.

ÉCOUTER / STREAMER LE TITRE :
 Spotify : https://open.spotify.com/artist/6nwXlQekmJdcz7n4ChqDT6
Apple Music : https://itunes.apple.com/us/artist/dj-zapaz/1878363395

SUIVRE DJ ZAPAZ :
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/djzapaz/
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/djzapaz

CHAPITRES DE LA VIDÉO (Timestamps)
0:00 - Intro (Clean Electric Guitar Riff & Tropical Percussion)
1:15 - Verse 1 (Le matin se lève et tu es encore là)
1:35 - Pre-Chorus (Chaque seconde compte quand c'est toi)
1:53 - THE DROP (Basse Agressive / Restez avec moi)
2:22 - Verse 2 (Ta présence remplit chaque espace vide)
2:42 - Pre-Chorus 2 (Tu es mon équilibre, ma renaissance)
3:00 - Chorus 2 (Ne partez jamais)
3:20 - Bridge (Sans toi les étoiles perdent leur éclat)
3:40 - Chorus 3 (Tu es mon aujourd'hui et mon demain)
4:00 - Outro & Instrumental Break (Dans le silence / Beat Only)

PAROLES / LYRICS :
Le matin se lève et tu es encore là
Ta chaleur efface chaque bataille
Je regarde tes yeux et j'oublie tout
Tu es le seul endroit où je veux rester debout

Les jours passent vite quand tu es près de moi
Mais chaque seconde compte quand c'est toi
Je ne veux plus connaître l'absence
Tu es mon équilibre, ma renaissance

Restez avec moi, ne partez jamais
Tu es la raison pour laquelle je respire
Restez avec moi, dans chaque instant
Tu es mon aujourd'hui et mon demain

Ta présence remplit chaque espace vide
Ton regard efface ce qui était livide
Je porte en moi la chaleur de tes mots
Tu es mon ancre, tu es mon repos

Sans toi les étoiles perdent leur éclat
Sans toi le monde n'a plus aucun sens
Je ne demande qu'une seule chose
Que tu restes là, que tu restes encore

Restez avec moi… je t'en supplie
Restez avec moi… toute ma vie
Restez avec moi… dans le silence
Restez avec moi… pour toujours… ici

snippet.title: Remember Your Summer in Sorrento? ❤️ Solo Una Notte a Sorrento | 1960s Italian Vintage Love Song
snippet.description:
Some memories last a lifetime.
Sometimes, all it takes is one unforgettable night beside the sea.
Solo Una Notte a Sorrento is a nostalgic 1960s-inspired Italian love song that captures the beauty of a warm summer evening on the Amalfi Coast. Beneath the moonlight, surrounded by lemon groves, gentle waves, and the timeless charm of Sorrento, two hearts discover a love they will never forget.
Inspired by the golden age of Italian music, this vintage-style ballad blends soft male and female vocals, warm analog sound, delicate acoustic guitar, orchestral strings, and cinematic Mediterranean atmosphere to recreate the romance of classic Italy.
Whether you remember your first love, your honeymoon, or simply dream of Italy's breathtaking coastline, this song is an invitation to relive those precious moments.
❤️ Subscribe to Riviera Vintage Music for original vintage-inspired Italian love songs, timeless melodies, and romantic journeys through the most beautiful places in Italy.

✅ Abonne-toi & active la cloche 🔔
